narrative:
St. Clairsville City has 3,717 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
